svg.title: Partially staged safety error terminal output
svg.desc: A terminal-style error box explaining that partially staged files cannot be fixed safely.

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace
ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace

g.text: Cannot safely fix partially staged files.

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace

g.text: Resolve staged vs unstaged changes first:

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace
ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace

g.text: Then run npm run fix:staged again.
